text: Your most unhappy customers are your greatest source of learning.
author: Bill Gates

text: Whenever you see a successful business, someone once made a courageous decision.
author: Peter F. Drucker

text: The secret of change is to focus all of your energy, not on fighting the old, but on building the new.
author: Socrates

text: In the business world, the rearview mirror is always clearer than the windshield.
author: Warren Buffett

text: Business opportunities are like buses, there's always another one coming.
author: Richard Branson

text: If you don't drive your business, you will be driven out of business.
author: B. C. Forbes

text: Don't find customers for your products, find products for your customers.
author: Seth Godin

text: The value of an idea lies in the using of it.
author: Thomas Edison

text: If you aren't embarrassed by the first version of your product, you shipped too late.
author: Reid Hoffman

text: Good business leaders create a vision, articulate the vision, passionately own the vision, and relentlessly drive it to completion.
author: Jack Welch

text: A business that makes nothing but money is a poor business.
author: Henry Ford

text: Success in business requires training and discipline and hard work.
author: David Rockefeller

text: The golden rule for every businessman is this: 'Put yourself in your customer's place.'
author: Orison Swett Marden

text: To be successful, you have to have your heart in your business, and your business in your heart.
author: Thomas Watson, Sr.

text: Great business is built on trust and reliability.
author: Anonymous

text: Chase the vision, not the money, the money will end up following you.
author: Tony Hsieh

text: Risk more than others think is safe. Dream more than others think is practical.
author: Howard Schultz

text: You can't do today's job with yesterday's methods and be in business tomorrow.
author: George W. Ochs Oakes

text: Quality is remembered long after the price is forgotten.
author: Guccio Gucci

text: Customer service shouldn't just be a department, it should be the entire company.
author: Tony Hsieh

text: Do not wait; the time will never be 'just right.' Start where you stand.
author: Napoleon Hill

text: If people like you, they'll listen to you, but if they trust you, they'll do business with you.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: The fastest way to change yourself is to hang out with people who are already the way you want to be.
author: Reid Hoffman

text: If you don't build your dream, someone else will hire you to help them build theirs.
author: Dhirubhai Ambani

text: There is no royal flower-strewn path to success. And if there is, I have not found it.
author: C.J. Walker

text: Play by the rules, but be ferocious.
author: Phil Knight

text: An entrepreneur is someone who has a vision for something and a want to create.
author: David Karp

text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
author: Steve Jobs

text: You don't need to have a 100-person company to develop that idea.
author: Larry Page

text: In order to succeed, your desire for success should be greater than your fear of failure.
author: Bill Cosby

text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
author: Walt Disney

text: Don't play games that you don't understand, even if you see lots of other people making money from them.
author: Tony Hsieh

text: Every problem is a gift—without problems we would not grow.
author: Anthony Robbins

text: Your brand is what other people say about you when you're not in the room.
author: Jeff Bezos

text: The customer is not a moron. She's your wife.
author: David Ogilvy

text: Where do you put the fear when you choose to innovate? The fear is there, but you have to jump anyway.
author: Arthur Sulzberger

text: High expectations are the key to everything.
author: Sam Walton

text: The best investment you can make is in yourself.
author: Warren Buffett

text: It's fine to celebrate success but it is more important to heed the lessons of failure.
author: Bill Gates

text: Never start a business just to make money. Start a business to make a difference.
author: Marie Forleo
